meta.note: Scan this first to find the right component. Then read the specific spec file for full details.

components.name: Button
components.description: Main CTA and action element. Use for any tappable action.

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Circular icon-only button for secondary or toolbar actions.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Toggleable pill for filters or category selection.

components.name: Type Chip
components.description: Vertical tile with illustration for group/expense type selection.

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with label, placeholder, helper text, and icon slots.

components.name: Label / Status Badge
components.description: Small semantic status indicator. Use for expense states, balance indicators.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicator with optional icon. Use for notification counts.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular user representation. Always use this — never custom circles for users.

components.name: Member Pill
components.description: Compact avatar + name pill for showing selected group members.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Single-select control. Use radio-item for list rows, radio-item-boxed for card-style.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Multi-select control. Use checkbox-item for list rows.

components.name: OTP Input
components.description: One-time password digit inputs. Use for verification screens.

components.name: Person Item
components.description: List row for a contact. Use in people lists, friend searches, payer selection.

components.name: Expense Item
components.description: List row for an expense entry with illustration and balance.

components.name: Group Card
components.description: Card showing a group with image, name, member count, and balance.

components.name: Create Card
components.description: Dashed card prompting new group creation. Sits alongside group cards.

components.name: Bottom Nav
components.description: Fixed floating pill nav bar. Only on main screens: home, people, activity.

components.name: Segment Control
components.description: Tab switcher within a screen for toggling between views.

components.name: FAB
components.description: 64px circular floating action button. Fixed bottom-right. Add expense shortcut.

components.name: Heading
components.description: Section heading row with title text and optional right-side action link.

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: Modal panel that slides up from bottom. Use for pickers, confirmations.

components.name: Top App Bar
components.description: Screen header with back icon, title, and optional right action. Use on all flow screens.

components.name: Header Chips
components.description: Horizontally scrollable chip strip directly below top app bar. Use for filters.

components.name: Action Button Row
components.description: Fixed bottom row with one or two full-width buttons. Use at end of flows.

components.name: Settlement Item
components.description: List row showing a person's balance with settle/remind CTA.

components.name: Avatar Stack
components.description: Row of overlapping avatars with +N overflow. Use on group cards and detail screens.

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Centered placeholder shown when a list has no items. Illustration + title + body + optional CTA.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Floating notification. Use for action confirmations and errors.

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Full-width pill search field with magnifying glass. Use on list/search screens.

components.name: Amount Input
components.description: Numeric input for split amounts. Supports 4 split modes.

components.name: Currency Chip
components.description: Pill button for currency selection with dropdown caret.

components.name: Status Bar
components.description: iOS-style status bar with time and system icons. Top of every screen.

components.name: FAQ / Accordion
components.description: Expandable question-answer item with toggle icon. Use for help/FAQ screens.
